scripts.build: npm run premods && wasm-pack build --target nodejs --out-dir pkg/nodejs -- --features redaction-rehydrate && npm run postpkg
scripts.build:ci: npm run premods && wasm-pack build --release --target nodejs --out-dir pkg/nodejs -- --features redaction-rehydrate && npm run postpkg
scripts.build:wasm:web: npm run premods && wasm-pack build --release --target web --out-dir pkg/web -- --features redaction-rehydrate && npm run postpkg && node ../../scripts/patch-web-env.mjs pkg/web/xberg_wasm.js
scripts.build:wasm:bundler: npm run premods && wasm-pack build --release --target bundler --out-dir pkg/bundler -- --features redaction-rehydrate && npm run postpkg
scripts.build:wasm:nodejs: npm run premods && wasm-pack build --release --target nodejs --out-dir pkg/nodejs -- --features redaction-rehydrate && npm run postpkg
scripts.build:wasm:deno: npm run premods && wasm-pack build --release --target deno --out-dir pkg/deno -- --features redaction-rehydrate && npm run postpkg
scripts.build:all: npm run build:wasm:web && npm run build:wasm:bundler && npm run build:wasm:nodejs && npm run build:wasm:deno && find pkg -name .gitignore -delete
